title: peristylus nitidus
intro: Peristylus nitidus is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Peristylus nitidus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which are believed to provide various health benefits including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion.
